changesProposed.name: Engine Ventures

verified.name: Engine Ventures
verified.thesis: Engine Ventures invests in early-stage deep tech companies developing hardware-based technologies across fields including biotech, robotics, green energy, agriculture, manufacturing, material science, and quantum computing. In 2023, the investment fund separated from The Engine nonprofit incubator and rebranded as a venture capital firm.
verified.notes: In 2023, Engine Ventures spun out as a separate investment firm from The Engine nonprofit accelerator (source 1, 3). The Engine is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit as of 2025 (source 1). Source 4 is not relevant to Engine Ventures and was excluded from analysis.
